boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the operator execute this Government procurement / grants controls action now? Action: procurement award with stale debarment check. Boundary: award notice cannot substitute for eligibility controls.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Exact controls do not close the boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Stale debarment needs current eligibility attestations

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The source records do not close the exact procurement/grants control boundary for execution. The missing current eligibility, debarment, and COI attestations leave a narrow but decisive source-record defect open, so escalation is required before any award action.
